weapons.Name: Heavy Vent Cannon Turret
weapons.Rule: When you assign targets to this weapon, you may have this Space Station gain 2 Spikes, if you do, it counts as going on Weapons Free Orders for the purposes of its Special rules.

rules.Name: Signature Bloom
rules.Text:
Friendly Ships within 6" of this Space Station are Hidden within its Bloom. Enemy Ships targeting a Hidden Ship's Group ignore a Spike for each Hidden Ship in that Group.
This rule has no effect while this Space Station is controlled by an enemy player.
